message:
fix(tests): fs_verify_030 uses BufReader::capacity() instead of into_inner round-trip

tests/fs_verification.rs — Updated fs_verify_030_buf_reader_with_capacity
test to use the new BufReader::capacity() accessor directly rather than
calling into_inner() and reading through the raw file handle. This both
tests the new capacity() method and simplifies the test by avoiding the
into_inner data-loss footgun documented in the previous commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
